subject: fix(quality): implement all code review audit fixes
body:
- Delete dead /src/ directory (11 unused scaffold files)
- Fix untracked setTimeout in MessageBubble.tsx swipe animation
  (store in ref, clear on unmount)
- Replace setTimeout(150ms) hack in ChatPanel.tsx and chat/[id].tsx
  with onLayout + requestAnimationFrame for FlatList scroll init
- Replace window.location.reload() in pull-to-refresh handlers with
  proper data refetch (keep reload only for clearData and PWA update)
- Rewrite usePolling.ts: add concurrent execution guard (isPolling),
  use refs for callbacks to prevent interval teardown on every render
- Gate logger.ts and debugLog.ts behind __DEV__ to suppress debug
  output in production builds
- Add babel-plugin-transform-remove-console to strip console.log/debug
  in production (preserves console.error and console.warn)
- Fix unused timestamp variable in logger.ts
- Replace all @ts-ignore with @ts-expect-error + explanatory comments
- Replace as any casts in subscriptions.ts with @ts-expect-error
- Type OneSignal SDK with proper interfaces instead of any
- Extract getMessageAge() utility in utils/formatting.ts, used in
  MessageBubble, MessageActionSheet, and services/messages

Tags: code-quality, tech-debt, cleanup, type-safety, performance
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
